Member-only story

Blaming Inheritance Is the Most Expensive Excuse You Own

2 min read
Just now

--

Press enter or click to view image in full size

Image Generated By AiIt’s comforting to believe wealth is mostly inherited. It’s also mostly wrong — and that belief is quietly costing you the one thing you actually control: your own decisions.

• The Stat Nobody Wants to Hear: The majority of self-made millionaires built their wealth from ordinary income — not inheritance. The “old money” narrative is real for a small slice of the wealthy, but it’s not the dominant path.
2. The Excuse That Feels Like Insight: “They were born into it” feels like a sharp observation. It’s actually a release valve — it lets you stop examining your own spending and investing habits because the game feels rigged anyway.
